creator: peterh@sapros.com
text:
New port: py-4Suite-0.9.2

Fourthought's proven, standards-based suite of software for Web
application development. 4Suite currently consists of four major
components, all of which are open-source. An XSLT processor, an
XPath implementation, an ODMG implementation, and an RDF library.

I've included the entire port as a uuencoded, gziped, tar file instead
of a diff because py-4Suite-0.9.0 (pr-21760) has not been submitted yet
and there were some pretty substantial changes. This pr should be
submitted instead of 21760.
